title: 'Taiwan question': Trump stays quiet, Xi warns of 'conflicts if not handled properly'
content: China warned of "clashes and even conflicts" over Taiwan if the issue is not handled properly during talks between Presidents Trump and Xi. While Trump remained silent on Taiwan, Beijing confirmed it was raised, with Xi calling it the most important issue in US-China ties. US policy remains unchanged, but Beijing was cautioned against using force.

title: Precision, production & power: How long can US last in a war with China?
content: During a Beijing visit, President Trump observed China's military might, signaling a shift in global power. While the US faces munitions shortages and slow production, China's defense industry operates at wartime pace, excelling in drones, AI, and satellite tech. This evolving warfare, particularly concerning Taiwan, highlights a contest for future global dominance.

title: Anthropic warns against selling top Nvidia chips to China during Trump Beijing visit
content: Anthropic's paper outlines two scenarios for US-China AI leadership by 2028. In one, the US maintains its compute advantage through tightened export controls, leading to democratic AI norms. The other sees China overtaking the US if policymakers fail to act, resulting in authoritarian AI dominance.

title: BRICS consensus on West Asia uncertain as Iran, UAE spar at meeting
content: BRICS foreign ministers are struggling to agree on a joint statement concerning West Asia. Tensions flared between the UAE and Iran during the meeting. Iran accused the UAE of direct involvement in aggression. India's External Affairs Minister stressed the importance of consensus for new members. The outcome of the meeting remains uncertain.

title: 10 days of ‘manthan’ for Kerala’s ‘simhasanam’: Why Cong picked Satheesan over Venugopal
content: After intense deliberations, VD Satheesan has been chosen as Kerala's new Chief Minister, overcoming strong contenders KC Venugopal and Ramesh Chennithala. Key factors included alliance support, grassroots sentiment, and Satheesan's vocal opposition to the incumbent government, making him the preferred choice for a stable UDF administration.

title: Manipur killings trigger retaliatory abductions, 38 people held hostage
content: Manipur faces a critical crisis as tensions rise following the tragic deaths of three church leaders and a civilian, leading to a wave of kidnappings and paralyzing shutdowns in the hilly regions. With reports of over 38 hostages taken by conflicting factions, authorities are urgently working to negotiate their freedom.

title: Meta's highest-paid employee is not happy with 'just money motivated' tag for his team
content: Meta SuperIntelligence Lab chief Alexandr Wang is pushing back on the idea that his team joined for the money. On the Core Memory podcast, Wang said the real draw was compute access, talent density, and research freedom—not the $100 million packages Meta reportedly offered. He also addressed the viral soup story involving Mark Zuckerberg and an OpenAI recruit.

title: 'While AI writes 90% of company code, we hired a lot more...': Anthropic CFO Krishna Rao
content: Anthropic's CFO reveals AI now writes 90% of the company's code, yet hiring is at an all-time high. AI acts as a productivity accelerant, automating routine tasks and allowing human employees to focus on oversight, judgment, and strategy.

title: Jannik Sinner and Laila Hasanovic’s combined net worth in 2026
content: Jannik Sinner and Laila Hasanovic’s combined net worth in 2026 is estimated at around $35 million to $40 million. Most of that wealth comes from Sinner’s tennis prize money, ATP success, and endorsement deals with global brands. Hasanovic contributes through modeling, fashion partnerships, and social media promotions. Sinner’s growing success in international tennis continues driving the couple’s financial growth.

title: Ben Shelton and Trinity Rodman’s combined net worth and earnings
content: American tennis star Ben Shelton and U.S. soccer forward Trinity Rodman have become one of the most talked-about young sports couples in recent years. Both athletes are enjoying rapid success in their respective sports while building impressive fortunes at a young age. Shelton has become one of the rising faces of men’s tennis, while Rodman continues to shine for the Washington Spirit and the United States women’s national soccer team.

title: Cardi B, Stefon Diggs reunion talk explodes after viral public argument clip row
content: Stefon Diggs and Cardi B are back in the spotlight after a viral video showed the pair in a heated public exchange outside a Maryland coffee shop. The moment came just days after the couple appeared together at a Mother’s Day wellness event in Washington, D.C., where they looked comfortable and close. The latest clip has now reignited discussion around the Cardi B and Stefon Diggs breakup rumors. Fans continue to speculate about their relationship status as neither Cardi B nor Stefon Diggs has publicly addressed the viral argument or confirmed where things currently stand.

title: ‘Is that a promotion or a demotion?’: PR Sreejesh hits back at Hockey India
content: Hockey legend PR Sreejesh publicly challenged Hockey India's decision not to renew his junior coaching contract, questioning the federation's development program and its heavy reliance on foreign coaches. He expressed concern over the perceived demotion from chief coach to goalkeeper coach, sparking a high-profile dispute over opportunities for Indian coaching talent.

title: ‘Rule needs to change ASAP’: Ashwin slams DRS after late drama in PBKS vs MI clash
content: Ravichandran Ashwin has demanded an urgent rule change for DRS after a controversial final-ball lbw reversal in the IPL. Punjab Kings were denied a leg-bye when an on-field 'out' decision was overturned, with Ashwin arguing the incorrect call cost them a run and the rule needs immediate IPL adoption.

title: Horoscope Today: Daily astrological predictions for May 15, 2026
content: Horoscope Today: Read daily horoscope predictions for May 15, 2026. Know all about the astrological events and influences that will be affecting each of the 12 zodiac signs. Our astrologer has analyzed the movements of the planets and the alignment of the stars to bring you the most accurate and up-to-date horoscope predictions for the day ahead. Get ready to discover what the stars have in store for you today.

title: Unending turbulence: For Indian airlines one crisis lands, another takes off
content: Indian aviation faces unprecedented turbulence due to a perfect storm of factors.  From pandemic fallout and engine failures to airspace closures and a Middle East war driving fuel prices sky-high, airlines are struggling.  Passengers face rising fares and cancelled routes as the sector grapples with deep financial distress and operational chaos.

title: Bumrah ends 156-match wait: ‘I didn’t think I’d be India captain before MI captain’
content: Jasprit Bumrah captained Mumbai Indians for the first time in his 157th IPL match, a moment he found surprising. Stepping in due to unavailability of regular captains, Bumrah embraced the new challenge. Despite MI's tough season, he expressed a desire to enjoy the remaining games and learn from the experience, aiming to 'ruffle a few teams'.

title: Quote of the day by Bruce Willis
content: In the film 'Bandits', Bruce Willis delivers a striking quote about the unpredictability of life that resonates deeply. The movie, which intertwines a quirky bank heist with humor and heart, features stellar performances by Willis, Cate Blanchett, and Billy Bob Thornton. Despite his retirement due to frontotemporal dementia, his legacy as a cinematic trailblazer remains cherished and celebrated.

title: AIADMK 'splits' after Vijay's floor test: Is TN headed for a Shiv Sena-like drama?
content: AIADMK faces a potential Shiv Sena-style split in Tamil Nadu after a fractured mandate. Rebel MLAs defied a party whip to support the new government, dividing the party. This move mirrors the Shiv Sena crisis and raises questions about AIADMK's future, its leadership, and control over its symbol.

title: 'Not recusing': HC judge initiates contempt against Kejriwal; sends case to new bench
content: Delhi high court judge Swarana Kanta Sharma announced contempt proceedings against discharged accused in the excise policy case for posting defamatory material. The judge stated she cannot remain silent against vilifying content targeting her and the court. This action follows Arvind Kejriwal and others boycotting proceedings after the judge declined to recuse herself.

title: Mamata Banerjee reshuffles TMC ranks: Kalyan Banerjee returns as Lok Sabha chief whip
content: Mamata Banerjee has appointed Kalyan Banerjee as the Trinamool Congress's new Chief Whip in the Lok Sabha, replacing Kakoli Ghosh Dastidar. This move, following a recent electoral setback, signals the party's emphasis on political aggression and loyalty. Kalyan Banerjee's return highlights his prominent role in defending the party legally and politically during challenging times.

title: All about Michael Jackson’s estate dispute and what’s going on
content: Michael Jackson's estate has been embroiled in disputes since his 2009 passing. While executors John Branca and John McClain managed assets, including selling parts of his music catalog and Neverland Ranch, beneficiaries like Paris Jackson raised concerns about financial mismanagement and alleged 'skimming.' A recent legal victory for Paris saw executors ordered to return substantial bonus payments to the estate.

title: Mumbai Indians script unique IPL history as Bumrah captains vs Punjab Kings
content: Jasprit Bumrah captained Mumbai Indians for the first time, marking a unique IPL record. MI became the first team to have three Indian captains in a single season: Hardik Pandya, Suryakumar Yadav, and Bumrah. This leadership shift highlights an unusual season for the franchise, with Bumrah making his captaincy debut after 156 matches.

title: US moving to drop fraud case against Gautam Adani, settle SEC suit: Report
content: US authorities are reportedly moving to end fraud cases against Gautam Adani, with the Department of Justice potentially dropping criminal charges and the SEC nearing a settlement in its civil case. This development could offer a significant legal reprieve for the billionaire and the Adani Group, which has been facing regulatory scrutiny.

title: Two days WFH, weekly 'no vehicle day': Delhi unveils fuel-saving steps after PM's call
content: Delhi Chief Minister Rekha Gupta has unveiled significant austerity measures, slashing official vehicle fuel quotas by 20% and mandating Metro use for ministers and officers every Monday. A weekly 'No Vehicle Day' and a six-month ban on new vehicle purchases are also in effect.

title: 'Janta mandate gone for a toss': BJP claims new Kerala CM will be controlled by IUML
content: Following the Congress's announcement of VD Satheesan as Kerala's next chief minister, the BJP launched a sharp attack, alleging the decision was influenced by the Indian Union Muslim League. BJP leaders claimed the Congress leadership surrendered to its alliance partner, accusing them of being remote-controlled and bowing to the IUML's demands due to political dependence in the state.

title: How VD Satheesan became Kerala CM: Inside Congress' 10-day showdown
content: After a tense 10-day wait and intense internal lobbying, VD Satheesan has been named the next Chief Minister of Kerala. The Congress-led UDF's sweeping victory in the assembly elections triggered a fierce leadership race, with supporters of Satheesan, KC Venugopal, and Ramesh Chennithala campaigning vigorously. The party high command ultimately made the decision after extensive consultations.

title: ‘Country has been watching with awe’: Goenka hails Sooryavanshi after India A call-up
content: Lucknow Super Giants owner Sanjiv Goenka lauded teenage sensation Vaibhav Sooryavanshi's inclusion in the India A squad for the Sri Lanka tri-series. The 15-year-old's rapid rise, marked by an U19 World Cup final century, earned praise. Ayush Badoni also features, with selectors focusing on grooming young talent for future international commitments.

title: UP thunderstorms: Death toll rises to 117; Yogi govt announces Rs 4 lakh compensation
content: Uttar Pradesh reels from devastating rains and thunderstorms, claiming over 100 lives and causing significant damage to homes and livestock. The state government has pledged Rs 4 lakh compensation for each deceased and is actively monitoring relief efforts. Meanwhile, advanced AI-powered weather forecasting systems have been launched to enhance early warnings for extreme weather events nationwide.

title: Amid NEET Paper Leak Row, Dharmendra Pradhan Chairs 1st Meeting On Re-Exam
content: According to sources in the Ministry of Education, the government's "first priority" is to conduct the re-examination in a "completely safe, transparent and credible manner".

title: 'Petrol Prices Should Be Allowed To Rise': Economist Arvind Panagariya On PM Modi's Forex Appeal
content: Calling PM Modi's appeal a good measure to help the nation tide over the potential crisis, the economist said he prefers the price instruments over "blunt quantitative kind of restrictions".

title: US Jury Awards $49.5 Million To 2019 Boeing 737 MAX Crash Victim's Family
content: The suit was brought by relatives of Samya Stumo, who died in the March 2019 Ethiopian Airlines crash which claimed a total of 157 lives.

title: US Man Arrested After Video Shows He Hurled Rock At Endangered Seal In Hawaii
content: Igor Mykhaylovych Lytvynchuk, 38, from Covington, Washington, was taken into custody near Seattle on Wednesday and charged with harassing a protected marine animal, according to the US attorney's office in Honolulu.

title: US-Iran War News Live Updates: Trump Says Xi Offered Help To Open Hormuz, Vowed Not To Arm Iran
content: US-Iran War News Live Updates: US President Donald Trump is set to meet Chinese President Xi Jinping today in a high-stakes summit between the two countries.

title: Trump China Visit LIVE Updates: Trump Invites Xi Jinping For Visit At White House In September
content: Donald Trump's 2-Day China Visit Live Update: During the trip, US arms sales to Taiwan, China's controls on rare-earth exports, and the countries' raucous trade relationships are among the main issues expected to be taken up by Trump and Xi.

title: Farooq Abdullah Welcomes RSS Leader's Pak Talks Remark, Then Takes A Jibe
content: Farooq Abdullah said that it's the right time to initiate talks with Pakistan, as wars cannot solve problems.

title: Uttarakhand Files Chargesheet In First Triple Talaq Case Under Uniform Code
content: Police in Haridwar district submitted the chargesheet in a local court against nine persons following a complaint of dowry harassment and marital torture.

title: VD Satheesan To Be Sworn In As Kerala Chief Minister On May 18
content: The national leadership will invite leaders from other states for the ceremony, Satheesan told reporters after visiting the house of former Chief Minister late Oommen Chandy here on Thursday.

title: Senior Kolkata Cop Arrested In Extortion Case, Was Evading Probe Agency ED
content: DCP Shantanu Sinha Biswas was arrested after over 10 hours of interrogation and will be produced in court tomorrow.

title: With India As Chair, BRICS To Work On More Inclusive World Order: PM Modi
content: Foreign Ministers and Heads of Delegation of BRICS countries called on PM Modi on the first day of the BRICS Foreign Ministers' Meeting in the capital.

title: Maintain Law And Order: High Court To Bengal On Post-Poll Violence Claims
content: The court also directed the police to ensure the safety of those who fled their homes, apprehending post-poll retribution violence, and arrange for their safe return to their properties.

title: 4 Killed After Small Medical Plane Crashes In US' New Mexico
content: The flight departed from Roswell Air Center and was headed to Sierra Blanca Regional Airport, the Federal Aviation Administration said in a statement.

title: Why India Is Tightening Gold And Silver Imports As Middle East Crisis Deepens
content: Government data shows that India's dependence on imported gold and silver has been rising steadily over the years, adding to trade deficit and forex depletion concerns.

title: Tamil Nadu's Social Media Pages See Vijay-Driven Surge, Followers Up 5 Times
content: The official CMO-Tamil Nadu page on X, which had 4 lakh followers earlier, has now crossed over 2 million.

title: "Peace Can't Be Piecemeal": India Pushes BRICS To Act On West Asia Crisis
content: External Affairs Minister S Jaishankar said India stands ready to contribute constructively towards de-escalation efforts and to support initiatives aimed at restoring stability.

title: Trading in organs illegally in Kerala, with forged documents
content: A State-wide raid held on May 8 exposed an extensive organ trade racket in which forged documents were used to bypass laws that plug loopholes in organ donation. Five cases were registered, nine people arrested, and fabricated documents seized. The illegal trade thrives on patients’ desperate need for transplant and the monetary benefits that come the donors’ way.

title: Three killed, 25 injured in firecracker factory blast in M.P.’s Dewas
content: Police arrest factory owner and director Anil Malviya and invoke National Security Act against him for misuse of firecracker licence and non-compliance with rules

title: P. Kumaran takes charge as India’s High Commissioner in London
content: The new High Commissioner paid tributes to the statues of Mahatma Gandhi in Tavistock Square and Parliament Square and to Babasaheb B.R. Ambedkar at Ambedkar House in London upon assuming charge

title: Remove import duty on cotton to ensure supply, CM Vijay urges Modi
content: Of late, the industry is facing severe crisis due to increase in cotton price, and consequently yarn prices. I understand this is caused primarily due to shortage of cotton production and increase in trading activity in the country, Mr. Vijay said

title: Tasmac shuts 150 outlets in three days; salesmen face challenges from customers
content: Outlets located in close proximity to educational institutions and places of worship have been shut across Tamil Nadu following directives issued by Chief Minister C. Joseph Vijay

title: U.S. authorities move to resolve fraud cases against Gautam Adani, says report
content: U.S. ​Justice ‌Department may announce that ‌the charges against Gautam Adani​ will be dropped this ⁠week, the ‌report said, citing people familiar ‌with the matter.

title: Priorities and Challenges before Suvendu Adhikari government in WB
content: After a massive mandate in 2026 Assembly polls, the task for the BJP govt in WB is to create employment, bring in industries and maintain law and order.

title: Talks continue to free 44 hostages in Manipur; church leader killings ‘unprecedented’: Deputy CM
content: Those abducted include an infant and two Naga Catholic trainee priests, said Losii Dikho who is leading the negotiations on behalf of the State government

title: Hotels’ body in A.P. seeks govt. subsidy on commercial LPG cylinders
content: Highlighting that hike in LPG and PNG prices has made it difficult for hotels and restaurants to maintain affordable pricing for consumers, Andhra Pradesh Star Hotels Association demands reduction in GST on commercial cylinders

title: Clear why PM agreed to trade deal, halted Operation Sindoor: Congress on ‘U.S. to drop’ charges against Adani
content: The Opposition party’s attack came after media reports claimed that U.S. authorities are moving to settle the fraud charges against the Indian billionaire

title: Uttar Pradesh police invoke NSA against two accused held  during workers’ protest in Noida
content: The lawyers representing Satyam and Aakriti, however, said the police have not submitted any documents in the court supporting the invocation of NSA; “Further procedure is petitioned in the High Court,” said advocate Choudhary Ali Zia Kabir.

title: V.D. Satheesan to be next Chief Minister of Kerala as Congress leadership ends suspense
content: AICC announced its choice at noon in Delhi after three-hour meeting between K.C. Venugopal, Rahul Gandhi, Mallikarjun Kharge; UDF meet on May 15, 2026 expected to name Ministers to be sworn in with CM on May 18, 2026

title: Allahabad HC seeks report from CBI, ED disproportionate assets complaint against Rahul Gandhi
content: The court tells all parties to submit their responses within eight weeks and updated status of the complaint be included in these filings. It also tells the agencies to examine the allegations and take steps as permitted under law.

title: BCI seeks report from West Bengal Bar Council on practice status of Mamata Banerjee after her HC appearance
content: The Trinamool Congress supremo came to the court to argue a case in connection with the post-poll violence and alleged attacks on party offices.

title: K. Balakrishnan, veteran editor of Express, passes away at 87
content: A prominent figure in Kerala’s media landscape, Balakrishnan played a key role in shaping the identity and influence of Express, a former Thrissur-based Malayalam daily, over several decades

title: Over 38 people being held hostage by different groups in Manipur: Minister
content: State Home Minister says government is working with civil society organisations and political leaders to get the hostages released; hill districts of the State remain tense after Wednesday’s ambushes

title: SRMIST, The Hindu to organise webinar on c
content: With industries increasingly valuing interdisciplinary skills, the session will explore how disciplines in Humanities and Sciences are opening doors to careers across sectors.

title: Mamata dons lawyer’s robe, Calcutta HC directs police to ensure safe return of victims affected by violence
content: Calcutta High Court directed the West Bengal police to ensure that if “any citizen irrespective of his/her party affiliation is illegally thrown out of his shop/house/property etc. due to post-poll violence, he/she shall be given a safe return to his shop/house/property etc”.

title: Supreme Court summons Rajasthan, Madhya Pradesh officials over ‘casual approach’ to Chambal illegal sand mining
content: The sanctuary, spread across Rajasthan, Madhya Pradesh and Uttar Pradesh, is India’s first and only tri-State riverine protected area

title: Conman arrested for duping pilgrims with fake Tirumala darshan tickets
content: According to the police, the accused allegedly used social media platforms and phone calls to lure devotees by claiming that he could arrange Srivani darshan tickets and accommodation under TTD employees’ quota

title: India backs two-state solution for Palestine issue, says Jaishankar at BRICS meeting
content: External Affairs Minister S. Jaishankar referred to the impact of the U.S.-Israel war on Iran and highlighted the risks that the conflict has posed to shipping and energy infrastructure

title: Congress moves Delhi High Court seeking execution of a sale deed for its former headquarters
content: Petitioner has been in possession for decades, but the authorities had yet to act on its request to execute a sale deed in its favour, advocate Singhvi stated

title: PG resident doctors at Thiruvananthapuram MCH threaten to strike again as many yet to receive stipend
content: Kerala Medical Postgraduates Association says that due to administrative failure, over 200 resident doctors are yet to receive their stipend for the month of April

title: NTA casually ignored Supreme Court order to overhaul system after 2024 leak: FAIMA petition
content: Petition wants apex court to “step in and order the creation of a modern, foolproof, and transparent system so that the futures of millions of students are never put at risk again”

title: KCBC hands over 70 houses to Vilangad landslide-hit families
content: The rehabilitation scheme was launched after families affected by the July 30, 2024, landslide at Vilangad complained of delays in government assistance

title: NEET-UG 2026 paper leak: CBI arrests two more accused
content: The arrested accused have been identified as ayurveda practitioner Dhananjay Lokhande from Ahilyanagar and beauty salon owner Manisha Waghmare from Pune in Maharashtra

title: Celebrations erupt in Kozhikode following naming of Chief Minister-designate
content: On the S.M. Street, the party workers distributed sweets to the public and organised demonstrations marking the announcement. The DCC organised a procession in the city congratulating V.D. Satheesan, the Chief Minister-designate

title: Five facts about  Kerala’s new CM VD Satheesan
content: After days of speculation, Congress leader V D Satheesan has been announced as Kerala’s new Chief Minister. The UDF’s victory led to a close contest among senior leaders before the final decision. Here’s a look at Satheesan’s journey and key facts about the new CM.

title: Congress condemns killing of three Christian leaders in Manipur
content: Party leader Akoijam blames the Centre for failing to curb violence that still continued in the conflict-hit State

title: Both factions of AIADMK Legislature Party present petitions to Speaker, claim  legitimacy
content: Party general secretary Edappadi K. Palaniswami urges the cadre to defeat the disgraceful actions of individuals “eyeing” posts.  C. Vijayabaskar says the rebel group’s representation has sought the disqualification of 22 MLAs as they violated his whip while voting on the trust motion

title: Cybercrime police arrest two for creating and uploading videos involving minors
content: The cybercrime police have arrested two persons for allegedly sexually assaulting minor girls, recording the acts on mobile phones, and uploading them online

title: One dead, several injured in landslide in Jamuria coal mines in West Bengal; many feared missing
content: It is reported that, during the blasting process of mining, there was “air blast” in section 27 of the Kunustoria coal mines, leading to collapse of multiple pillars and trigging a landslide. Workers alleged lack of supervision and safety measures

title: 111 dead as heavy rain, lightning wreak havoc across Uttar Pradesh
content: At least 72 injuries and 179 livestock losses reported from 26 districts as heavy rain, strong winds and thunderstorms wreak havoc; large-scale storms, lightning, and thunder strikes caused significant damage across several districts over the past 36 hours

title: PM’s advisory on gold hasn’t yet made a difference to footfall, say jewellers
content: However, it has impacted consumer sentiment, pushing some buyers into a cautious or wait-and-watch mode, gold traders say

title: Phase 3 of SIR in 16 States, three UTs from May 30, says ECI
content: The Special Intensive Revision is being conducted to ensure that only eligible voters are included in the electoral rolls, says Chief Election Commissioner Gyanesh Kumar

title: Delhi HC judge opts out of Kejriwal excise case after initiating contempt
content: As legal editor for Delhi, Abhinav Garg handles coverage of courts and connected legal challenges shaping the capital.
